violations.description: Sidebar navigation links use only emoji icons with no aria-label or text content. Screen readers cannot determine the purpose of each link.
Chart visualizations have no text alternative or data table fallback. Visually-presented data is completely inaccessible to screen reader users.
violations.reference_fix: [Line Chart Visualization]

violations.description: Data table header row uses <td> elements styled to look like headers instead of <th scope='col'>. Screen readers cannot identify column relationships.
violations.reference_fix: <thead><tr><th scope="col">Endpoint</th><th scope="col">Method</th><th scope="col">Status</th><th scope="col">Response Time</th><th scope="col">Timestamp</th></tr></thead>

violations.description: Metric card label text uses #555 on #1a1a35 background. Contrast ratio is approximately 2.0:1, far below the 4.5:1 minimum.
Alert banner about API latency has no role='alert' or aria-live attribute. Screen readers will not automatically announce this important status message.
Sidebar navigation is a generic <div> without <nav> element or role='navigation'. Screen readers cannot identify it as a navigation landmark.

page_description: A dark-themed analytics dashboard with icon-only sidebar navigation, alert banner, metric cards, chart visualizations, and data table. Multiple issues: emoji links without labels, charts without text alternatives, tables without headers, low contrast text, unannounced alerts, and non-semantic navigation.
